programme.title: Desert Law
programme.desc: In Pima County, AZ, deputies confront ongoing drug-related activity during their patrols; deputies Stewart and Garza arrest a driver and uncover multiple syringes allegedly loaded with heroin; Deputy McCall-Miller recalls the biggest drug bust of his career.

programme.title: Desert Law
programme.desc: It's peak summer in Pima County, and an extreme heat warning scorches the desert by day; but when night falls and the temperatures drop, crime surges, sending Deputy Cassels after reckless drivers and Deputy Stewart into the fight against narcotics on the desert streets.

programme.title: Desert Law
programme.desc: Alcohol plus blistering heat make for a dangerous cocktail in Pima County, AZ; Deputy Tautimez Saavedra confronts a drunk driver threatening his neighbor with a handgun, while Deputy Pool finds a vehicle that may have been involved in a fatal hit-and-run.

programme.title: Desert Law
programme.desc: In Pima County, Ariz., the Sheriff's Department fights crime at night; Detective McLeod pursues a hit-and-run driver while Deputy Stewart encounters couples in parked cars.

programme.title: Desert Law
programme.desc: As the Fourth of July weekend roasts Pima County, fireworks and tempers ignite; on his first July 4th shift, Deputy Cassels investigates an assault at a teen holiday party, while Deputy Allen recalls a foot chase through the desert where she almost became the victim of "friendly fire.".

programme.title: Desert Law
programme.desc: In Pima County, Arizona, the blistering desert heat leaves tempers short and drivers on edge; Deputy Pool arrests an alleged DUI speeder with kids in the car, while Deputy McCall-Miller pulls over a driver who's in possession of a Bowie knife and a pocket full of meth.

programme.title: Desert Law
programme.desc: In the unforgiving desert of Pima County, Arizona, Deputy Pool tracks down a reckless driver whose run from the law sparks a pursuit involving multiple units, while Deputy Casillas finds himself in a tense standoff where every move counts.

programme.title: RateEscape: Stop Overpaying For Cellular
programme.desc: Cut up to half the cost of your monthly cell phone bill; same towers, same coverage, but a lot less money; it sounds great but is it too good to be true?; join myth-busting legend Kari Byron as she takes on Big Wireless to save you money.

programme.title: Rachael Ray's Meals in Minutes
programme.desc: Rachael takes fried chicken up a notch with a homemade curry and yogurt marinade; John makes an iced mint tea mule; Maria shares her recipe for buttery poppy seed biscuits to serve alongside the chicken.

programme.title: Rachael Ray's Meals in Minutes
programme.desc: Rachael turns a classic eggplant sub into a sausage-style sandwich with a punchy blend of pantry spices; John shakes up a smoky bourbon Manhattan; Maria adds a sweet finish with spumoni cookies.

programme.title: Zombie House Flipping
programme.desc: Work on a giant zombie house in one of Orlando's historic districts forces the team to follow certain guidelines that could come at a historic cost.

programme.title: Zombie House Flipping
programme.desc: When Justin and Ashlee take on the flip of a ramshackle two-unit property, they conspire to draw a skeptical Duke and Keith into the mix to fend off a mysterious squatter and complete the tricky multifamily house makeover.

programme.title: Zombie House Flipping
programme.desc: Two risky properties test the Zombie team: a DIY disaster and a promising triplex pushed to the brink by perfectionist upgrades. With budgets tight and the market shifting, they race to turn chaos into profit before these flips fall flat.

programme.title: Zombie House Flipping: Family Business
programme.desc: Tommy Harr bets big on a rundown rural property no other flipper would touch and calls in his family to help pull off the impossible; but once demolition begins, the surprises stack up: major structural damage, infestations, and a back addition with no foundation; what starts as a risky flip quickly turns into a full-scale rebuild; in a bold move to boost value, Tommy gambles on adding a 400-squar

programme.title: Million Dollar Zombie Flips
programme.desc: James Dainard is staring down the most damaged house he's ever seen; floor-to-ceiling mold forces his team to don hazmat suits just to inspect it; the house is damp, decayed, and looks like it's been underwater for years; however, James sees potential: a smart layout, massive yard, breathtaking views, and a chance to create a grand primary suite and modern kitchen; with the scope massive and the r

programme.title: Squatters
programme.desc: A young couple in Philadelphia lists their home for sale, only to find a squatter already living in it; when confronted by Flash's team, he is completely shocked and produces a fraudulent lease; but can Flash see through the scam and help the homeowners take back what's rightfully theirs?

programme.title: Squatters
programme.desc: When a stranger moves in and takes over the new home of Nabih and Kadeisha, Flash and his team are deployed to Dearborn, Michigan with one goal: out squat the squatter; but what starts as a straightforward job becomes a battle of endurance when the trespasser challenges Flash to see who can hold their ground the longest.
